# Vault Security Skill

Use this skill for secure vault changes. Assume expert-level Rust and Tauri knowledge, but keep explanations beginner-friendly.

Reusable steps:
1. Validate input
2. Encrypt data
3. Store locally
4. Reveal only on explicit action
5. Avoid logging secrets
